title: Customers
excerpt: This object represents a customer of your business. Use it to [create recurring charges](https://docs.stripe.com/docs/invoicing/customer.md), [save payment](https://docs.stripe.com/docs/payments/save-during-payment.md) and contact information, and track payments that belong to the same customer. - [POST /v1/customers](https://docs.stripe.com/api/customers/create.md) - [POST /v1/customers/:id](https://docs.stripe.com/api/customers/update.md) - [GET /v1/customers/:id](https://docs.stripe.com/api/customers/retrieve.md) - [GET /v1/customers](https://docs.stripe.com/api/customers/list.md) - [DELETE /v1/customers/:id](https://docs.stripe.com/api/customers/delete.md)
